evals.prompt: Track SDD workflow usage for pablo.castaneda in the last 20 days
evals.expected_output: Agent builds JQL with assignee=pablo.castaneda and date range for last 20 days, queries Jira, returns markdown report with phase adoption, funnel conversion, and issues detail table.

evals.prompt: SDD adoption for team SUMO from 2026-03-01 to 2026-03-31 in JSON
evals.expected_output: Agent builds JQL with project=SUMO and date range, queries Jira, returns JSON with total_issues, phase_counts, funnel, and per-issue detail.

evals.prompt: How many issues went through SDD phases for project OCTOPUS last 30 days?
evals.expected_output: Agent uses --project OCTOPUS --days 30, returns phase adoption counts and conversion funnel between spec/plan/dev/code-review.
